meaning: adj.松软的,水分过多的,流鼻水的,易流动的
examples: Symptoms are streaming eyes, a runny nose, headache, and a cough.
You will probably experience the symptoms of sneezing, itchy and watery eyes, stuffy or runny noses and scratchy throats.
Cold symptoms such as stuffy nose, runny nose and scratchy throat typically develop gradually, and adults and teens often do not get a fever.
Six months later, he was taken to the hospital after developing a runny nose and fever.
But side effects can include mild flu-like symptoms, including a runny nose or sore throat.
